mnemonics.title: Shared Memory Reduction Steps
mnemonics.content: LRSW - Load into shared memory, Reduce with stride-halving, Sync after every step, Write block sum from thread 0. Like pouring water into a funnel: many streams at the top, one output at the bottom.

mnemonics.title: Why atomicAdd Is Slow
mnemonics.content: SCGL - Serialization (one at a time), Contention (gets worse with more threads), Global memory (400-800 cycle latency), Locality ignored (skips fast shared memory). Think of a single toll booth on a 1000-lane highway.
